en.extract:
The Boran cisticola (Cisticola bodessa) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya and Uganda. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland.

The '''Boran cisticola''' ('''''Cisticola bodessa''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]]. It is found in [[Ethiopia]], [[Kenya]] and [[Uganda]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical dry forest]], dry [[savanna]], and [[subtropical or tropical dry shrubland]].
